title: FAHH Mace
description: Replaces the dull Mace hit sounds with the legendary "FAAAHH" meme effect for maximum impact.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/5ZlS9ZIHd68" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>Transform your Mace into a meme machine! > Tired of the standard Mace sounds? This resource pack replaces the hit and heavy smash effects with the iconic "FAAAHH" sound. Every critical hit and ground smash will now feel ten times more powerful (and hilarious).

Features:

Custom "FAAAAHH" Sounds replace with all mace sounds

Fully compatible with Minecraft 1.21.x and above.
